source_pages.title: Attensify — AI-Powered Digital Marketing Platform for Businesses
Pricing — AI Marketing Platform Plans | Attensify
Creator Programme — Earn While You Grow | Attensify
How to Use Attensify | Step-by-Step Guides | Attensify
Blog — Digital Marketing Insights & Strategies | Attensify

evidence: Homepage title: "Attensify — AI-Powered Digital Marketing Platform for Businesses"
Pricing page title: "Pricing — AI Marketing Platform Plans | Attensify"

one_sentence_description.value: Attensify is an AI marketing platform that plans, executes, and optimizes content, ads, SEO, blogs, and websites autonomously.
evidence: Homepage hero: "AI marketing platform that plans, executes, and optimizes your content, ads, SEO, blog, and website — autonomously."
Homepage: "Your AI marketing team. Always on."
Homepage: describes itself as an "AI marketing platform"
Feature pages for content management and ads management

business_model.value: B2B SaaS subscription with free and paid plans
evidence: Pricing page shows Starter, Growth, and Scale plans with monthly pricing
Homepage: "Free plan, no expiry" and "Free forever plan"
Pricing page: "Start free. Upgrade when you need more."
Pricing page with live plans and checkout links
Homepage: "Trusted by 67+ businesses across 5 countries"
Testimonials and usage stats shown across the homepage

primary_icp.value: SMBs and agencies running digital marketing
primary_icp.description: Businesses that want to automate content, ads, SEO, and publishing; the pricing page explicitly frames plans for SMBs and agencies.
evidence: Pricing page heading: "Plans for SMBs and Agencies"
Homepage: "Built for real teams" and customer examples for agency director, e-commerce manager, marketing head

secondary_audiences.description: Starter plan is explicitly positioned for solo founders getting started.
evidence: Pricing page: "Starter — For solo founders getting started"

secondary_audiences.description: Separate creator programme targets content creators, marketers, and digital professionals who promote Attensify for commission.
evidence: Creator page: "Turn your audience into recurring income"
Creator page FAQ: "Any content creator, marketer, or digital professional with under 50K followers"

audience_notes.value: The site primarily speaks to marketing-led businesses and agencies, with a separate creator referral program for distribution. The homepage also references e-commerce, SaaS, consulting, and agency use cases.
evidence: Homepage: industry tabs include "E-commerce SaaS Agency Consulting"
Pricing page: "For agencies & enterprise teams"

buyer_pains.pain: Marketing work is fragmented across too many tools
buyer_pains.description: Teams are juggling separate tools for content, ads, SEO, and reporting.
evidence: Testimonial: "juggle four separate tools"
Homepage: "one platform" and "single source of truth"

buyer_pains.pain: Manual content planning and scheduling takes too much time
buyer_pains.description: Users want to reduce the time spent planning and publishing social content.
evidence: Homepage: "Ship faster. Save hours."
Testimonials: "70% less planning time" and "plan two weeks in 20 minutes"

buyer_pains.pain: Ad budgets are hard to optimize in real time
buyer_pains.description: Teams need better allocation, testing, and ROAS control across ad platforms.
evidence: Ads page: "AI optimizes budgets in real-time"
Blog: "How to Improve ROAS"

buyer_pains.pain: SEO work is hard to manage at scale
buyer_pains.description: Businesses need keyword tracking, audits, and content that can actually rank.
evidence: AI SEO section: "continuously monitors your rankings, audits technical issues, analyses competitors"
Blog: "How to Track 500+ SEO Keywords Without Losing Your Mind"

buyer_pains.pain: Agencies need to manage multiple client accounts efficiently
buyer_pains.description: The site emphasizes multi-client management and white-label reporting for agencies.
evidence: Pricing page: Scale plan includes "multi-client dashboard" and "white-label reports"
Testimonial: "Managing 6 client accounts was chaos before this"

product_capabilities.description: Generates on-brand posts, captions, and copy from brand voice and guidelines.
evidence: Content Management page: "Generate on-brand content in seconds"
Homepage: "AI writes in your brand voice"

product_capabilities.description: Provides drag-and-drop planning, scheduling, and cadence management across platforms.
evidence: Content Management page: "Visual Content Calendar"
Homepage: content calendar screenshots and scheduling language

product_capabilities.description: Publishes content to 15+ social platforms and auto-formats per platform.
evidence: Content Management page: "Publish to 15+ platforms at once"
Pricing FAQ lists Instagram, LinkedIn, Twitter/X, Facebook, TikTok, Pinterest, YouTube, Threads

product_capabilities.description: Tracks engagement, reach, conversions, and performance by post and format.
evidence: Content Management page: "Track engagement, reach, and conversions"
Homepage: "Per-post performance analytics"

product_capabilities.description: Builds and manages campaigns across Google, Meta, and LinkedIn from one dashboard.
evidence: Ads Management page: "Manage Google, Meta, and LinkedIn campaigns from one dashboard"
Pricing page Growth plan includes "Ads management (Google, Meta, LinkedIn)"

product_capabilities.capability: AI budget allocation and bid optimization
product_capabilities.description: Monitors campaign performance and reallocates spend in real time.
evidence: Ads Management page: "AI continuously monitors campaign performance and reallocates budget"
Homepage: "AI-powered workflows" and ROAS dashboard language

product_capabilities.description: Tests headlines, creatives, audiences, and landing pages automatically.
evidence: Ads Management page: "Automatically test headlines, creatives, audiences, and landing pages"

product_capabilities.description: Shows ROAS performance live across platforms with alerts and exports.
evidence: Ads Management page: "Track Return on Ad Spend across all platforms in real-time"

product_capabilities.description: Monitors rankings, audits technical issues, and tracks keywords.
evidence: AI SEO section: "automated technical site audits" and "keyword rank tracking"
Pricing page Growth plan: "SEO audit & rank tracking"

product_capabilities.description: Researches SERPs, writes long-form articles, and publishes SEO-optimized posts.
evidence: Homepage: "AI researches, writes, and ranks your articles"
AI Blog section: "writes an SEO-optimized long-form article, and publishes"

product_capabilities.description: Generates landing page layouts, copy, CTAs, and A/B tests conversion elements.
evidence: AI Website section: "AI builds pages that convert"
Homepage: "AI generated page layouts & copy"

positioning_summary.value: Attensify positions itself as an autonomous, all-in-one AI marketing team that replaces fragmented tools and manual coordination across content, ads, SEO, blog, and website workflows.
evidence: Homepage: "Your AI marketing team. Always on."
Homepage: "one AI command" and "without human hand-holding"
Pricing/testimonials emphasize a "single source of truth"

primary_differentiators.description: The platform claims to turn a single prompt into coordinated work across content, ads, SEO, blog, and website updates.
evidence: Homepage: "plans, executes, and optimizes ... autonomously"
Agentic AI section: "breaking this into 5 parallel workstreams"

primary_differentiators.description: Attensify emphasizes replacing multiple separate tools with one dashboard and one workflow.
evidence: Homepage: "Works with the tools you already use"
Testimonials: "single source of truth" and "juggle four separate tools"

primary_differentiators.description: The product claims to learn and write in the customer’s brand voice.
evidence: Content Management page: "Train AI on your brand voice and guidelines"
Homepage: "Brand voice locked — direct, insight-led"

primary_differentiators.description: Marketing automation is framed around measurable outputs like ROAS, SEO rank, and conversions.
evidence: Ads page: "Maximize ROAS with AI"
Content analytics and SEO score language across the site

primary_differentiators.description: The scale tier includes white-label reports, multi-client management, API access, SSO, and a dedicated account manager.
evidence: Pricing page: Scale plan features
Homepage testimonials from agency director and co-founder

category_point_of_view.value: Marketing teams should not have to stitch together disconnected tools or manually coordinate every channel; AI can orchestrate planning, production, publishing, optimization, and reporting from one system.
evidence: Homepage: "one AI command" across content, ads, SEO, blog, and website
Homepage: "single source of truth"

positioning_notes.value: The site repeatedly blends marketing automation, AI agent language, and channel-specific execution. It also extends the value proposition with a creator program and press release distribution, but the core product remains the AI marketing platform.
evidence: Homepage: "Agentic AI" section
Creator programme and Press & Media sections on the homepage
Homepage brand voice labels: "Data-driven", "Direct", "Authoritative"
Copy such as "Ship faster. Save hours." and "Let AI handle your marketing. You focus on growth."

writing_style.value: Punchy, benefit-led, and product-demo oriented, with short claims, quantified outcomes, and repeated automation language.
evidence: Homepage and feature pages use concise headline/subhead structure
Frequent quantified claims like "67+ businesses", "15 minutes", "real-time", "500+ keyword rank tracking"
Homepage hero: "Your AI marketing team. Always on."
Homepage: "Automate your entire digital marketing with one AI command."
Homepage: "run marketing on autopilot"
Homepage closing CTA
Homepage testimonial and dashboard copy
Homepage section headline

messaging_patterns.pattern: Frames the product as a replacement for multiple separate marketing tools.
messaging_patterns.description: The site repeatedly contrasts one unified platform with fragmented workflows and tools.
evidence: Homepage: "We used to juggle four separate tools" testimonial
Homepage: "one platform"

messaging_patterns.pattern: Uses quantified claims and real-time metrics to signal performance.
messaging_patterns.description: Copy includes statistics, ROAS, SEO scores, and time saved to show measurable value.
evidence: Homepage stats and testimonials
Ads and SEO feature pages

messaging_patterns.pattern: Emphasizes autonomous execution rather than partial assistance.
messaging_patterns.description: Messaging focuses on planning, executing, publishing, and optimizing with minimal human input.
evidence: Homepage: "no human hand-holding required"
Agentic AI section and feature pages

missing_information: Legal entity specifics beyond the company name are not stated.
Annual pricing details are mentioned but not fully enumerated.
Exact customer logos or named customer case studies are limited.
Integration depth is listed only at a high level; full integration specifics are unclear.
potential_risks: Some homepage testimonials and stats may be promotional and should be treated as marketing claims rather than independently verified outcomes.
The site includes a separate creator programme and press release offering, which should not be confused with the core SaaS product.
The crawl contains repeated CTA and dashboard-style demo sections that may overstate how central certain features are.
profile_quality.notes: The crawl provides strong evidence for product category, ICP, capabilities, and positioning because it includes homepage, pricing, feature, creator, and blog pages. Confidence is highest for core marketing claims and plan details.
